content:
[Intro] C9  Gm  F  C  C9  G  F  C

C9               Gm                  F
  Just yesterday morning they let me know you were
 C
Gone
C9           G                      F
  Susan the plans they made put an end to you
C9                  Gm             F
  I walked out this morning and I wrote down this
 C
Song
C9               G               F
  I just can't remember who to send it to

F           Dm                 C   C9
  I've seen fire and I've seen rain
             F                Dm
  I've seen sunny days that I thought would never
 C  C9
End
             F                  Dm
  I've seen lonely times when I could not find a
 C    C9
Friend
        F                      Dm       C
  But I always thought that I'd see you again

             C9               Gm
  Won't you look down upon me Jesus you've got to
 F              C    C9
Help me make a stand
                      G              F
  You've just got to see me through another day
C9          Gm            F           C
  My body's achin' and my time is at hand
C9         G          F
  I won't make it any other way

           C9                        Gm
  Then I'm walking my mind through an easy time my
F                       C
Back turned toward the sun
C9                     G                    F
  Lord knows when the cold wind blows it'll turn your head around
               C9                  Gm
  Now there's hours of time on the telephone line
    F                    C
To talk about things to come
C9                  G                  F
  Sweet dreams and flying machines in pieces on the ground
